## scope

- [ ] brain (LLM decision layer)
- [ ] skills (the skill vocabulary)
- [ ] dashboard / API
- [ ] watchdog / supervision
- [ ] multi-LLM provider support
- [ ] documentation
- [ ] other:

## fits the project's spirit?

warden is the **operational** layer for LLM-driven bots. features
that handle a failure mode you actually hit are easier to land than features
that are nice-to-have.
